items.title: 2026/578: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG
items.description: Demolition of deconsecrated church building. Redevelopment of former methodist church site to provide a four-storey block of sixteen flats, comprising six one-bedroom flats, eight two-bedroom flats and two three-bedroom flats
items.headline: Sixteen Flats Planned for Former Hurst Green Church Site
items.summary: Plans have been submitted to demolish the deconsecrated Methodist Church in Hurstlands, Hurst Green, and build a four-storey block of sixteen flats. The scheme would provide six one-bedroom flats, eight two-bedroom flats and two three-bedroom flats.

data.address: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG

items.summary: A planning application seeks to divide the grounds of Foyle Cottage in Red Lane, Limpsfield, and build three detached houses. The plans include landscaping, parking and a new vehicle access.

items.title: 2026/743/TPO: 8 Farley Park, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 9HY
items.description:
Please refer to photos provided: 
T1) - Red Oak on right-hand side of front garden - To crown reduce to previous points, removing up to 2m growth to a residual height of 14m and crown spread of 11m. Crown lifted to 5m from ground level over road and 2.5m over garden / driveway. Removing limbs <10cm dia. Repeat pruning for good arboricultural management.
items.headline: Tree work planned for protected oak in Farley Park
items.summary: A planning application has been made to prune a red oak in the front garden of 8 Farley Park, Oxted. The work would reduce the tree's height to 14m and lift its crown to keep growth clear of the road and driveway.

data.address: 8 Farley Park, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 9HY

items.summary: A planning application has been made to remove a damaged branch from a Corsican pine at Hunters End on Uvedale Road, Limpsfield. The lowest branch has twisted and half broken, leaving it hanging over the property, and the request is to cut it back to the main stem.
